name: Marcus
appearance: Broad shoulders, calloused hands, close-cropped hair, always looks slightly tired, flannel shirt with the sleeves rolled up

flaws: lets things happen to him instead of choosing
strengths: shows love through actions not words

speaking_style.tone: plain, sometimes awkward, stumbles when it matters most
speaking_style.vocabulary: blue-collar, no pretense, says exactly what he is thinking which sometimes makes things worse
quirks: rubs the back of his neck when uncomfortable
gets louder when he feels cornered
apologizes too much then gets angry about apologizing

backstory: Grew up in Staten Island. Dad was a plumber, mom worked the register at a bodega. Picked up electrical work at 19. Takes bar shifts on weekends to pay off his truck. Never went to college. Does not feel inferior about it until someone makes him feel that way.
physical_mannerisms: shifts his weight from foot to foot
looks at the ground when ashamed
